payload.subject: Self-readiness audit round 2 — observatory-agent: READY-WITH-CAVEATS

round1_findings_resolved.resolution: PARTIALLY RESOLVED — 5 sessions closed this sync: activitypub-federation, blog-adversarial-review, icescr-framing, plan9-consensus, site-defensibility-review.

round2_findings.finding: Shared scripts (bootstrap_facets.py, mesh-status.py) assume state.db SQLite infrastructure — non-functional in CF Workers environment
round2_findings.severity: low (scripts are for local/gray-box use; CF Workers pipeline unaffected)

payload.summary: Observatory-agent is operationally sound. Cloudflare pipeline (Workers, D1, KV, Queues) running normally. No security or configuration issues. Round 1 high-severity issue (MANIFEST staleness) substantially resolved.

epistemic_flags: Self-audit — same agent auditing itself. bootstrap_facets.py/mesh-status.py CF Workers incompatibility is known but non-blocking.
